mapper.select: SELECT * FROM math_course WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM math_course WHERE course_code = #{courseCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO math_course (course_name, course_code, category_id, teacher_id, credit, term, description, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{courseName}, #{courseCode}, #{categoryId}, #{teacherId}, #{credit}, #{term}, #{description}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
